description.value:
One of the muted madrosarai bloodlines, stone-bloods are often employed as medics or philosophers. You always take time to analyze a situation rather than reacting rashly.

You can cast the @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spells.Item.Analyze Target] cantrip as an arcane innate spell at will. A cantrip is heightened to a spell rank equal to half your level rounded up. Increase the status bonus granted by analyze target by 1.
